'''鈭歯-w-d-b''' ('''kanawdeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:embale|embale]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-w-d-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:embale|embale]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-w-d-b
|-
! Lemma
| kanawdeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinawdeboko|thinawdeboko]] || [[word:jinawdeboko|jinawdeboko]] || [[word:shinawdeboko|shinawdeboko]] || [[word:kinawdeboko|kinawdeboko]]
